title: Death and Rebirth program
wikitext:
[]: Death and Rebirth program             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Wed Oct 02, 2013 10:09 am There were two different programs for Death and Rebirth weren't there? if so how can tell which I have and which the other one is so I can get the other one. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 02, 2013 11:09 am That's the standard edition D&R. Tale a look at this: http://evaotaku.com/html/programbooks.html

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Wed Oct 02, 2013 3:32 pm thanks I never knew what to look for. :) Also is the special edition rare or is it easy to find?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 02, 2013 5:22 pm I don't know how many are in circulation, or what a fair price would be, but I found a Buy it Now listing on eBay, which price + shipping would cost me $26. As a collector, I think that's reasonable. And if I'm not mistaken that's about what I paid for it about 10 years ago when I bought it at a convention. You may find a better deal elsewhere, but for convenience, it seems okay. http://www.ebay.com/itm/Evangelion-Death-Rebirth-Movie-Program-Book-Anime-GAINAX-Art-/360738870275

[]:             Quote Post by ILUVASUKALANGLEY » Wed Oct 02, 2013 9:23 pm thanks for the links I've bought it now I have to wait for it
